examples: Be careful! Don't jab his eye out with your bamboo pole.
Don't worry if you aren't familiar with the JAB index, I just invented it!
More than 11 million people from groups deemed a "priority", are being offered the jab, alongside two million health and social care staff.
Instead of having to remove and insert the ammo cartridge, giving it a firm jab suffices.
Parents on Teesside are being targeted in a campaign to give more children the MMR jab.
